seo.title: All-in-One Calculators for Rise of Kingdoms (ROK)
body: ROK Math is a free, comprehensive collection of calculators built specifically for Rise of Kingdoms players. From speedup durations and commander EXP to building upgrades, research costs, and equipment crafting, you can find every calculation you need in one place — fast, accurate, and completely free.

Every tool uses precise in-game data to deliver instant results. With no sign-up required and minimal ads, you can focus entirely on planning your account progression and spending your resources with maximum efficiency.

items.question: Are ROK Math calculations accurate?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely. All calculations are based on exact in-game data and mechanics from Rise of Kingdoms, ensuring your resource and speedup planning is 100% accurate.

items.question: Do I need to register or create an account?
items.answer: No, sign-up is never required. ROK Math is entirely free to use, allowing you to access all calculators instantly without logging in.

items.question: Is the calculation data up to date?
items.answer: Yes. We regularly update our database to reflect the latest Rise of Kingdoms patches, updates, and new commander releases.

items.question: Which calculators are available on the site?
items.answer: We offer a wide range of tools, including Speedup Calculators, Commander EXP Calculators, Resource Planners, VIP Point Calculators, and Building/Research cost estimators.

items.question: Does ROK Math work on mobile devices?
items.answer: Yes! Our website is fully optimized and responsive for mobile devices, so you can easily calculate your ROK stats on the go while playing the game.

items.question: Is this an official Rise of Kingdoms website?
items.answer: No, ROK Math is a fan-made project created by players, for players. We are not officially affiliated with, endorsed, or sponsored by Lilith Games.

seo.heading: RoK Speedup Calculator: Manage Your Time in Rise of Kingdoms
seo.intro: Every successful governor in Rise of Kingdoms knows that time is their most valuable resource. Whether you are pushing for the top rank in the Mightiest Governor Event or preparing for KvK, knowing exactly how much time you have stashed in your inventory is crucial. A reliable rok speedup calculator helps you add up all your universal, building, training, research, and healing speedup items in seconds. By using a rise of kingdoms speedup calculator, you avoid tedious manual math and can plan your account progression with absolute precision.
seo.how: The mathematical logic behind calculating your total time is very straightforward. The calculator takes the minute value of each speedup pack you own and multiplies it by the quantity you have. Then, it sums up all these individual totals. For example, if you input 10 packs of 60-minute speedups and 5 packs of 480-minute speedups, the tool calculates: 10 × 60 + 5 × 480 = 3000 minutes. This simple formula ensures you get an accurate picture of your total available time, which is then converted from total seconds into days, hours, and minutes for easier reading.
seo.tips: To get the most out of your account, always wait for relevant events before burning through your time. Save your training items for specific KvK stages where troop training yields points. Always ask for Alliance Help before applying any items to a building or research timer, as those helps reduce the initial timer significantly before you even need to speed it up. Use the tool to verify if you have enough total time to finish a tier 5 research before an event ends, preventing wasted resources on partially completed tasks.

faq.q: Can I calculate different types separately?
faq.a: Yes, you can calculate generic, building, training, research, and healing categories individually to see exactly what you have available for specific tasks.

faq.q: Why is the raw total shown in minutes?
faq.a: In the game, these items are fundamentally stored as minute packages. The tool processes everything in minutes first to ensure perfect mathematical accuracy before converting the final result into days, hours, and minutes.

faq.q: Does this calculation include Alliance Help?
faq.a: The tool simply calculates the raw time present in your inventory. Alliance Help is calculated separately when you actually start an upgrade or research, which reduces the required time by around 1% per help for longer timers.

seo.heading: Rise of Kingdoms Gem Calculator
seo.intro: Managing resources efficiently is crucial for progressing, especially when preparing for More Than Gems (MTG). Instead of manually counting every inventory item, using a reliable rok gem calculator saves time and prevents errors. A rise of kingdoms gem calculator quickly totals your available premium currency, showing exactly what you have ready for VIP levels, Castle upgrades, or the Wheel of Fortune.
seo.how: The tool operates on a straightforward formula based on your in-game inventory. It calculates the total by multiplying the value of each gem bundle by the quantity you own, and then summing them all up. The standard item values included in the formula are 5, 10, 50, 100, 200, 500, 650, 1000, and 2000. Simply input the number of items you have for each corresponding value, and the calculator will automatically multiply and add them together to give your exact total.
seo.tips: Always wait for spending events like MTG to convert your inventory items into VIP points or Castle books. Do not pop your gem items until you actually need to spend them; keeping them safely stored prevents accidental spending. Use this tool before major events to track your progress easily.

faq.q: Does the calculator include gems from daily objective chests?
faq.a: No, the calculator strictly counts the guaranteed items currently sitting in your inventory (the 5 through 2000 values). It does not predict future drops or unopened random chests.

faq.q: Why are the 650 gem items separated?
faq.a: The 650 value is tied to specific in-game bundles. Because it is a distinct item value in your inventory, it requires its own input field in the formula to ensure your final total is completely accurate.

faq.q: Is it safe to use this tool?
faq.a: Absolutely. This is simply a mathematical utility. It just runs the multiplication and addition formula based on the numbers you type in, requiring zero account access or connection.

meta.title: About — ROK Math
meta.description: Who built ROK Math and why? A free calculator collection for Rise of Kingdoms players.

about.title: About
about.subtitle: Why and how I built this site.
body: Hello, I'm İsmail. I'm writing from Turkey and I'm a Rise of Kingdoms player just like you. I discovered the game about two months ago and, honestly, I didn't expect to love it this much. I'm currently playing as an infantry main in Kingdom 4066 — strategizing, managing resources, and making the right move at the right time are the most enjoyable parts of the game for me.

However, after a while, I found myself doing the same calculations over and over: how many speedups do I need, how many troops can I train, how much EXP is required to level up a commander... Most of the existing tools were either outdated, available in only one language, or just clunky to use. So, I thought, "I can do this better," and built this website.

My goal is simple: to help players get accurate results quickly and effortlessly. Everything is free, no registration is required, and I've kept it as straightforward as possible. I hope it makes your gameplay a bit easier too!
If you spot a bug or have any suggestions, feel free to reach out via the contact page — I read every single message.
about.supportNote: If you find these tools helpful, you can support the project.
